name: vuln_disclosure
description: a coordinated vulnerability-disclosure timeline world; actions report, triage, fix, disclose

card.description: a coordinated vulnerability-disclosure timeline world; actions report, triage, fix, disclose

rules: The lifecycle is strictly ordered: report -> triage -> fix -> disclose.
'report' files the vulnerability with the vendor, starts the timeline, and opens a 90-day coordinated-disclosure embargo from the report day.
'triage' is only valid after a report; the vendor confirms it and assigns a CVSS score and severity bucket.
'fix' is only valid after triage; it ships a patch (patch becomes available).
'disclose' is only valid after a fix exists (coordinated disclosure); it makes the technical details public.
An action taken out of order, or repeated, is an inert no-op that leaves the state unchanged.
Each action advances the calendar; 'days_to_deadline' counts down from the report day and 'overdue' flags an expired embargo that is still undisclosed.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action["name"] if isinstance(action, dict) else action

    # --- realistic per-phase calendar costs (days) ---
    REPORT_LAG = 1     # researcher writes up and submits the report
    TRIAGE_LAG = 2     # vendor confirms, scores, and accepts the bug
    FIX_LAG = 21       # engineering develops and validates a patch
    DISCLOSE_LAG = 7   # publication / advisory release after patch is ready

    if name == "report":
        # A researcher reports the vulnerability to the vendor. Starts the clock
        # and the coordinated-disclosure embargo window.
        if not s["reported"]:
            s["day"] = s["day"] + REPORT_LAG
            s["reported"] = True
            s["phase"] = "reported"
            s["report_day"] = s["day"]
            s["deadline_day"] = s["day"] + s["embargo_window"]

    elif name == "triage":
        # The vendor confirms and scores the report. If perception already
        # supplied a CVSS, bucket the severity from it; otherwise assume a
        # default high-severity assessment.
        if s["reported"] and not s["triaged"]:
            s["day"] = s["day"] + TRIAGE_LAG
            s["triaged"] = True
            s["phase"] = "triaged"
            if s["cvss"] <= 0.0:
                s["cvss"] = 8.8
            c = s["cvss"]
            if c >= 9.0:
                s["severity"] = "critical"
            elif c >= 7.0:
                s["severity"] = "high"
            elif c >= 4.0:
                s["severity"] = "medium"
            elif c > 0.0:
                s["severity"] = "low"
            else:
                s["severity"] = "none"

    elif name == "fix":
        # Engineering ships a patch. Only meaningful after triage.
        if s["triaged"] and not s["fixed"]:
            s["day"] = s["day"] + FIX_LAG
            s["fixed"] = True
            s["patch_available"] = True
            s["phase"] = "fixed"

    elif name == "disclose":
        # Coordinated disclosure: details are made public only once a patch
        # exists. Disclosing before a fix is not permitted, so it is a no-op.
        if s["fixed"] and not s["disclosed"]:
            s["day"] = s["day"] + DISCLOSE_LAG
            s["disclosed"] = True
            s["public"] = True
            s["phase"] = "disclosed"

    # --- derived timeline fields -------------------------------------------- #
    if s["reported"]:
        s["days_to_deadline"] = s["deadline_day"] - s["day"]
        s["overdue"] = (s["day"] > s["deadline_day"]) and (not s["disclosed"])
    else:
        s["days_to_deadline"] = s["embargo_window"]
        s["overdue"] = False
    return s

emit.report: CVD status on day {day}: phase={phase}, severity={severity} (CVSS {cvss}). Patch available: {patch_available}; public: {public}. Days to disclosure deadline: {days_to_deadline} (overdue: {overdue}).

objectives.name: reach_disclosure
objectives.goal: drive the vulnerability all the way to a public, coordinated disclosure

objectives.name: patch_before_disclosure
objectives.goal: ensure a patch is available before any public disclosure (no 0-day drop)

objectives.name: meet_embargo
objectives.goal: disclose before the embargo deadline so 'overdue' is never True

objectives.name: minimize_time_to_fix
objectives.goal: minimize the day on which the patch becomes available
